title: Neil Davies
compiled_truth: Neil Davies is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-09-07 to 2002-02-19), Neil Davies sent 19 and received 143 emails, totalling 162 interactions. Top correspondents: [David Oxley](people/david-oxley) (8), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (6), [Jeanie Slone](people/jeanie-slone) (6), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (6), [Amanda Curless](people/amanda-curless) (4).
